role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of visible text; stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant types (garrigue, sclerophyllous) and biomes.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road width, shoulders, and utility poles.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (camera generation, pole style) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the Mediterranean biome and narrowed candidates to Southern Europe, but failed to distinguish Uruguay from Spain/Greece due to the lack of unique visual markers (text, specific road signs) in the image. The hallucination regarding utility pole material in the meta agent is a minor error.

meta: Hypothesis evaluations: 'The utility poles are simple wooden poles...' (Image shows concrete poles)

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described karst topography and scrub.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described road width and lack of signs.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Incorrectly identified pole material as wood in evaluations, though correctly as concrete in initial assessment.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: Uruguay was not in the candidate pool.
